title: stamnos #4713
definition:
1) among the Greeks an earthen jar, into which wine was drawn
    off for keeping but also used for other purposes
    1a) of the little jar in which the manna was kept, laid up in the
        ark of the covenant
nasbUsage:

    off for keeping but also used for other purposes
    1a) of the little jar in which the manna was kept, laid up in the
